home.heroSubtitle: Technically superior athletic apparel designed for the modern elite. Precision engineering meets high-end minimalism.
home.philosophyDesc: APEX LUXE was founded on the belief that peak performance requires an uncompromising commitment to detail. We strip away the unnecessary, leaving only what is essential.

product.photoStream: SHARED BY ATHLETES IN THE GYM
product.unlockDnaDesc: Log in or sign up to let APEX AI build your personalized Activewear Aesthetic Profile.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Select premium sportswear from our catalog to kickstart your recovery.
cart.secure: Secure checkout powered by APEX PAY
cart.emptyCartDesc: Select premium sportswear from our catalog to kickstart your recovery and performance.
cart.upsellDesc: Saved items. Move them to your cart instantly.
cart.wishlistVacantDesc: Tap the heart icon on any products in the catalog to save them for later considerations.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.vacantDesc: Add items to your bag before proceeding to checkout.
checkout.newsletter: Email me with exclusive news and offers
checkout.successDesc: Thank you for your purchase. We've sent a confirmation email to {email}. Your tracking ID is {id}.
checkout.encryptionSeal: Your payment details are protected by 256-bit SSL encryption for a secure premium experience.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal credentials, billing info, and performance order tracking.
profile.noOrders: You haven't placed any orders yet.

assistant.title: AI Shopping Assistant
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask APEX AI about products, fits, sizes or order support...
assistant.emptyState: No active conversation. Ask a question to start.
assistant.welcome: Welcome to APEX LUXE. I am your AI Outfit Stylist. Tell me about your training goals, climate conditions, or preferred aesthetic (e.g., "outdoor marathon under light rain", "heavy squat workout", "premium travel outfit"), and I will engineer the perfect kit for you.
assistant.addFullKit: ADD FULL CURATED KIT TO BAG
assistant.kitAdded: SUCCESS: I have added this curated kit directly to your shopping bag. You are ready for peak performance.

shop.title: Shop All
shop.subtitle: The complete APEX LUXE catalog. Filter by category, size, color, or technology to find your perfect piece.
shop.adjustFiltersDesc: Try adjusting or resetting your size, color, or technology filters to find a match.
shop.noItemsCategory: No items in this category yet
shop.noItemsCategoryDesc: We don't have any products available in the selected category at this time.
shop.newArrivalsDesc: The latest additions to the APEX LUXE collection. Fresh drops engineered for those who demand nothing less than the pinnacle of performance and style.
shop.performanceDesc: Technical athletic gear designed for peak physical output. Explore compression wear, thermal layers, and breathable fabric engineering.
shop.noNewArrivalsDesc: Check back soon for the latest drops.
shop.noPerformanceDesc: Explore the full collection for more options.

tracking.title: Tracking Order
tracking.subtitle: Real-time transit logging for consignment: {id}.
tracking.notFoundDesc: Unable to locate shipping logs for ID: {id}. Verify the tracking link or sign in.
tracking.refundedDesc: This transaction has been terminated. Stripe refund has been processed and inventory stocks were returned.
tracking.cancelledDesc: This transaction has been terminated. Consignment cancelled and stocks released.

loyalty.title: APEX LUXE LOYALTY
loyalty.noTransactions: No transactions yet. Shop to earn points!
loyalty.howItWorksStep1: Share your referral link with friends
loyalty.howItWorksStep2: They sign up — you earn 200 points instantly
loyalty.howItWorksStep3: They make their first purchase — you earn 500 bonus points

vendor.registerDesc: Launch your technical athletic apparel collection inside the APEX LUXE catalog. Gain access to luxury buyers, multi-vendor splits, and AI-driven pricing engines.
vendor.setupStripeDesc: Your store {name} is registered. To activate inventory listings, complete verification details, and process splits, connect your account to Stripe.

stripeBenefits.payouts: Separate split payouts to your bank account

vendor.inventoryWarning: Inventory Warning: {count} items have reached or dropped below their low-stock thresholds.
vendor.settingsDesc: Configure your APEX storefront metadata, support channels, brand visuals, and business address
vendor.listProductsDesc: List, edit, and moderate your active sportswear inventory
vendor.deleteProductConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
vendor.stripePayoutsDesc: Monitor Stripe Connect transfers, commission splits, and pending ledger status
vendor.orderFulfillmentDesc: Track incoming split purchases, fulfill orders, and supply tracking references
vendor.noOrders: No orders have been placed with your store yet.
vendor.storeDescPlaceholder: Tell customers about your brand's technical specifications, athletic innovations, and aesthetics...
vendor.configureBrandAppearance: Configure how your brand appears on product listings and customer receipts.
vendor.ensureCustomerReach: Ensure customers can reach you with shipping inquiries or refund requests.
vendor.supplyHighResImages: Supply high-resolution images for your brand's digital identity.
vendor.specifyOperatingLocation: Specify the operating location of your administrative office or warehouse facility.
vendor.processedTransferredDesc: Successfully processed and transferred to your bank account via Stripe Connect.
vendor.heldPayoutsDesc: Held payouts awaiting verification completion or Stripe processing intervals.
vendor.noPayoutsFound: No payout transfers found in the ledger.
vendor.detailsRequiredDesc: Some details are required to verify your business and bank details. Complete the Express Onboarding configuration.
vendor.connectedVerifiedDesc: Your Connected Account is verified and configured for automatic splits on checkout transactions.
vendor.noActiveProductsListed: No active products listed in your store.

admin.adminRequired: Administrative credentials required. Your current session does not possess the permissions necessary to view the dashboard logs.
admin.welcomeBack: Welcome back. Review administrative metrics, checkout volumes, and sales curves.
admin.saasDesc: Monitor Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR), manage multi-tenant store states, and audit global AI telemetry.
admin.noStores: No store tenants registered on the platform.
admin.storeConfigDesc: Manage storefront branding designs, custom domain SSL options, SaaS subscriptions, and sweep caching metrics.
admin.customCssPlaceholder: /* Customize your store fonts, borders, or navigation bars */
admin.customDomainDesc: Connect your own domain name (e.g. brand.com) by pointing your DNS CNAME record to cname.apexluxe.com.
admin.failedSweepCache: FAILED TO SWEEP REDIS CACHE RECORDS
admin.sweepCacheDesc: Forced data clearing invalidates products listings cache and sweeps any expired items. This ensures instant updates when uploading raw images or sync-ing local assets.
admin.superAdminDesc: Promoted super_admin credentials bypass all role hierarchy permissions checks.
admin.stripeWebhookDesc: Stripe signature verification prevents spoofing or replay events during checkout payments.
admin.auditTrailsDesc: All administrative mutations (products, refunds, orders) are archived with user metadata stamps.

saas.launchBrand: Launch Your E-Commerce Brand In Seconds
saas.deployStores: Deploy dynamic, AI-native multi-tenant storefronts on the APEX LUXE retail engine. Complete with Stripe SaaS Billing, full theme customization, isolated DB instances, and dedicated Let's Encrypt SSL custom domains.
saas.provisionDesc: Provision your brand database and custom domain configs instantly.
saas.provisionSuccessDesc: Your isolated retail database, theme variables, and CMS pages have been compiled.
saas.tieringDesc: Transparent tier allocations to fit your brand. Instantly upgrade inside settings to expand product listings and unlock custom DNS mapping.
saas.starterDesc: Perfect for boutique launches or local testing catalog drop.
saas.growthDesc: Accelerated plan for expanding catalogs and custom styling.
saas.proDesc: Enterprise-grade feature packages for established retailers.
saas.entDesc: Unrestricted global logistics routing and custom SLA.
saas.tenantIsolationDesc: Every store runs on isolated query contexts. Your products, catalogs, customer order metrics, and style portfolios remain fully mathematically secure.
saas.stripeSaaSDesc: SaaS billing is fully automated using Stripe Billing Checkout and Portals. Upgrades and downgrades instantly sync with active inventory quotas.
saas.customDomainThemesDesc: Map your own custom domains instantly with Let's Encrypt SSL certificates. Theme engine lets you configure brand colors and styling properties dynamically.

errors.assistantUnreachable: Connection error. The APEX AI assistant is currently unreachable. Please try again.
errors.uploadOutfit: Please upload at least one outfit image.
errors.networkErrorDesc: Could not connect to the APEX LUXE catalog service. Please verify that your local NestJS backend is active on port 5000.
errors.apiErrorDesc: The server responded with an error: {error}. Please check your query or try again.

aiStylist.title: APEX AI STYLIST
aiStylist.subtitle: Multimodal design assessment and live product synergy coordinates
aiStylist.formatsError: {name} must be a PNG, JPG, or WEBP image
aiStylist.uploadPrompt: Please upload at least one outfit image
aiStylist.styleSessionSuccess: Logged into APEX LUXE styling dashboard
aiStylist.welcomeStyle: Welcome to your APEX styling consult. I have analyzed your fit with the **{aesthetic}** profile. Overall Score is **{score}/100**. How would you like to refine this look? (e.g. "suggest better shoes", "make this more minimalist")
aiStylist.savedSuccess: Outfit saved to your APEX profile
aiStylist.testingEmailHint: For testing, enter any valid email address to authenticate.
aiStylist.fashionIntelRequired: Welcome to the AI Fashion Intelligence suite. Please sign in with your enterprise credentials to access activewear coordinate scoring, live product matching, and the style persona panel.
aiStylist.chatRefinementDesc: Ask Groq AI to tweak coordinates or suggest accents
aiStylist.diagnosticsCenterDesc: Please upload design photos of your outfit on the left, select your matching style persona, and click "Launch Design Evaluation" to trigger the visual AI pipeline.
aiStylist.noSavedOutfits: No saved outfits yet. Analyze a fit first and save it!
aiStylist.noHistory: No evaluations run in this profile session.
aiStylist.coordinatedGeneratorDesc: Let the APEX AI query the live product database catalog to generate a fully matching, color-coordinated sportswear outfit using real items.
aiStylist.coordinateOutputDesc: Choose your routine goals, select persona styling directives, and tap "Generate Style Coordinate" to view catalog combinations.

performance-athlete.name: Performance Athlete
performance-athlete.desc: Technical metrics, compression drapes, and optimal thermo-regulation.

minimalist-athlete.name: Minimalist Athlete
minimalist-athlete.desc: Silent luxury active wear, sleek tone-on-tone coordinates with zero logos.

streetwear-hybrid.name: Streetwear Hybrid
streetwear-hybrid.desc: Technical base layers layered under relaxed drop-shoulder city wear.

luxury-gymwear.name: Luxury Gymwear
luxury-gymwear.desc: Double-knit premium fleeces and luxury weights for private clubs.

functional-runner.name: Functional Runner
functional-runner.desc: Weatherproofing layers, featherlight shoes, and extreme breathability.

oversized-urban.name: Oversized Urban
oversized-urban.desc: Baggy sportswear cuffs, boxy heavy coordinates, and street presence.

footer.desc: Defining the next era of performance apparel through technical precision and uncompromising aesthetic standards.
footer.earlyReleases: Access exclusive early releases, limited collections, and the latest in technical performance innovation.
footer.subscribed: SUBSCRIBED SUCCESSFULLY. WELCOME TO THE CIRCLE.
footer.terms: BY SIGNING UP, YOU AGREE TO OUR PRIVACY POLICY AND TERMS OF SERVICE.
footer.copyright: © 2026 APEX LUXE. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED. FOR DEMONSTRATION PURPOSES.

charts.ratioDesc: Graphical ratio of active tokens and operational models

adminCatalogIntelligence.title: Catalog Intelligence
adminCatalogIntelligence.desc: Transform product inventory metrics into high-fidelity AI-understandable models. Manage bulk tagging schedules, audit styling heuristics, and query semantic search maps.
adminCatalogIntelligence.bulkSyncDesc: Triggering bulk sync pushes all catalog items to our background queue. The Groq agent will evaluate fabrics, gym/streetwear ratios, aesthetics, and compute fit mappings.
adminCatalogIntelligence.playgroundDesc: Test natural language shopper intents. See how our prompt engine categorizes, extracts aesthetics, and calculates match relevance.
adminCatalogIntelligence.playgroundPlaceholder: e.g. 'jacket for cold wind and light rain that pairs with dark joggers'
adminCatalogIntelligence.noResults: NO RELEVANT PRODUCTS DISCOVERED FOR THIS QUERY

adminCoupons.title: Promo Coupons
adminCoupons.desc: Issue promotional voucher discount campaigns, manage expiration schedules, and regulate usage parameters.
adminCoupons.discountPercentRange: DISCOUNT PERCENT MUST BE BETWEEN 1 AND 100
adminCoupons.maxUsesPositive: MAX USES MUST BE A POSITIVE INTEGER
adminCoupons.expiryFuture: EXPIRATION DATE MUST BE IN THE FUTURE
adminCoupons.failedCreate: FAILED TO CREATE COUPON. ENSURE STRIPE KEYS ARE CONFIGURED OR RETRY.

adminGlobal.title: Global Commerce
adminGlobal.desc: Configure multi-region currencies, country taxes, shipping rates, closest-warehouse routing rules, and execute cross-warehouse transfers.
adminGlobal.transferDesc: Deduct physical stock from a source warehouse and immediately complete the transfer to the target distribution center.
adminGlobal.rebalancerTitle: Groq AI Logistics Demand & Stock Rebalancer
adminGlobal.resolvingTopology: RESOLVING SUPPLY CHAIN TOPOLOGY ON GROQ LLAMA 3.3 MODEL
adminGlobal.insightDesc: This analysis is generated in real-time by a deep Llama 3.3-70B model checking catalog low-stock alerts, cross-border shipping delays, and warehouse-level inventory reservations.
